description.value:
Trigger An ally is about to use an action that requires a skill check or attack roll.

You're always willing to jump in and help, even if you don't know what you're doing. You Aid a willing ally, even if you didn't prepare to help them ahead of time. You gain a +4 circumstance bonus on your check to Aid, but after the triggering check, your ally becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Clumsy]{Clumsy 1} until the end of their current turn.
